docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCLOUD, STEPHANIE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCCLOUD, STEPHANIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FENSKE, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 41 21ST AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94121, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FENSKE, MICHAEL
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $17.50 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCLOUD, STEPHANIE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCLOUD, STEPHANIE AS TO DEFENDANT FENSKE, MICHAEL SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCLOUD, STEPHANIE SERVED AUG-11-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FENSKE, MICHAEL
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT FENSKE, MICHAEL
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED UNSATISFIED; SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT FENSKE, MICHAEL
